CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_claims', false, '6dWk8M7axknLqL9igW_-SjCioTdrPkjJHeclOdOXLJM', 'v3.5.0--9TDlm67x4mY6MY2rs85FT0QyP68jSvbhxOOy8-80bf4', 'YhuNZLMz8HRaBPWrHrKAxone1proV4JNGFNFJHWQFd4'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_claims; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_claims (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_quotes', false, 'W-EVotDwsiw3OcPVUe1KZ3J2TCKRXfMa9fSMh7fLhPY', 'v3.5.0--8dpJ9Jk8NwRJQ66YCbB86Xbo1nhz-JNvqogiYf67SDY', 'o_LjEVGWejNIMnmx3hbiqDEPnCiD2z_8hV8OKdFR9n0'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_quotes; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_quotes (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_memes', false, '7iTHqDEHryIFjDg-UahsUH1ljgZ7dcVYtLJC8L3Iqew', 'v3.5.0--inThamuldj3MesKG0d8BOFpTzuF4LhHZn5fFyxx2yc0', 'c8NzrWVfVGGA3gYrQokkCHlcshzVE8MS7XsduiRp0UU'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_memes; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_memes (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_memes VALUES ('memes/memes/_ReadMe.md', 'Memes', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h1",{"id":"memes"},"Memes"],["p",{},"This folder contains markdown files for memes displayed on the site."],["h2",{"id":"how-to-add-a-meme"},"How to Add a Meme"],["ol",{},["li",{},"Place your image in ",["code",{},"public/memes/"]," or a subfolder (PNG or JPG recommended)."],["li",{},"Create a ",["code",{},".md"]," file in this folder with the same name as your image (but with ",["code",{},".md"]," extension)."]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Frontmatter and structure:"]],["pre",{"className":["language-text"],"code":"---\ntitle: \"Short Meme Title\"\n---\n\n![alt text](/memes/subfolder/your-meme.png)\n\nOptional caption or description.\n","language":"text"},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},"---\ntitle: \"Short Meme Title\"\n---\n\n![alt text](/memes/subfolder/your-meme.png)\n\nOptional caption or description.\n"]],["ul",{},["li",{},"The ",["code",{},"title"]," should be a short, descriptive name for the meme."],["li",{},"The image path in the markdown must match the location in ",["code",{},"public/memes/*/*.{png|jpg}"],"."],["li",{},"You can add an optional caption or description below the image."]]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"how-to-add-a-meme","depth":2,"text":"How to Add a Meme"}]}}', 'This folder contains markdown files for memes displayed on the site.', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/memes/_readme', '{"title":"Memes","description":"This folder contains markdown files for memes displayed on the site."}', 'memes/_ReadMe', 's_xWl108lBdNRv-eVXW-KvDs4n9STznVNHgR07kqw6k'); -- s_xWl108lBdNRv-eVXW-KvDs4n9STznVNHgR07kqw6k
